title: Fixed #31097 -- Fixed crash of ArrayAgg and StringAgg with filter when used in Subquery.
body:
Tackling https://code.djangoproject.com/ticket/31097

For the review, commit-by-commit and the commit messages should explain what I did :)

Questions:
* do I need to add information to potential docs/release notes for backports on LTS versions?
* do I need to open PRs to these branches for the backports?

I should have sent you the CLA by email by now :)
commits: Refs #31097 -- Added tests for filter in ArrayAgg and StringAgg.

Fixed #31097 -- Fixed crash of ArrayAgg and StringAgg with filter whe…
…n used in Subquery.
